falsifier: If LITTLE THINGS dwarf high-chi2 fraction exceeds the SPARC dwarf high-chi2 fraction by more than 10 percentage points under the locked policy, the dwarf-friendliness prediction of phi-locked ILG is refuted.
ingest_step_required: Download the public LITTLE THINGS rotation curves and Iorio et al. 2017 decomposition products, normalise them into SPARC-shaped columns (rad, vobs, verr, vgas, vdisk, vbul, sbdisk, sbbul), and place under external/gravity/legacy/archives/little_things/.
next_actions: place catalog and rotmod files at the planned paths
rerun this script without --check to record SHA256 of every file
